description_long: This is a large, translucent plastic garbage bag filled with various types of household waste. The bag is tightly packed, causing it to bulge and stretch, with its contents pressing visibly against the plastic surface. Through the semi-transparent material, one can discern cardboard, food scraps, plastic containers, and other miscellaneous refuse. The top of the bag is gathered and twisted, likely secured with a knot, creating a wrinkled, pinched appearance at the closure. The surface of the bag is glossy and reflects light, highlighting the uneven, lumpy texture created by the irregularly shaped contents inside. Some printed labels and text from the discarded packaging are visible through the plastic, adding to the visual complexity.
description: A large, bulging translucent plastic garbage bag filled with mixed household waste, tightly closed at the top and showing visible contents and printed labels through its glossy surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the most detail, with cardboard, food packaging, and a variety of colored refuse clearly visible through the stretched plastic.
description_view_1: This view highlights the gathered, twisted closure at the top and shows a more diffuse, less detailed view of the contents, with some red and green items visible.
description_view_2: From this angle, the bag's bulging shape is prominent, and the plastic appears more reflective, with less distinct content visible except for some colored packaging.
description_view_3: This view shows the back of the bag, with a large area of printed text and images visible through the plastic, and the overall fullness of the bag is apparent.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: The bag is bulging and appears overfilled, with its surface stretched tightly over irregular contents.
